hooks.command: command -v mcp-memory >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[m3-memory] mcp-memory CLI not on PATH. Run: pipx install m3-memory && pipx ensurepath' >&2
command -v mcp-memory >/dev/null 2>&1 && /bin/sh "$(mcp-memory chatlog hook-path 2>/dev/null || echo /dev/null)" || true
command -v mcp-memory >/dev/null 2>&1 && /bin/sh "$(mcp-memory chatlog hook-path 2>/dev/null || echo /dev/null)" || true
